reason: Darkly satirical dystopia probes absurdity with haunting surreal beauty
Existential chess with Death unfolds in starkly beautiful medieval landscapes
Poetic angels observe human longings in exquisitely dreamy black-and-white
Drifting journey through lost souls feels detached and starkly lyrical
Bleak wartime courtroom drama confronts human absurdity with austere grace
Unclothed truth about vulnerability and society's striptease in stark realism
Grizzled outlaws face moral ambiguity amid merciless landscapes
Ultraviolent future Britain questions free will in chilling absurdity
Rain-slicked neon cityscape questions identity in moody existential noir
Iconic cosmic odyssey stares into the void with majestic, unsettling beauty
